id="xD4pd0Jw3O8DJ77NfEvC-7" parent="xD4pd0Jw3O8DJ77NfEvC-6" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;rounded=1;fontFamily=Lucida Console;labelBackgroundColor=none;fontColor=#143642;" value="<div>Decentralized task management.</div><div><ul><li>Task fullfillment application for programming or other technical<i> </i>tasks.</li><li>Uses GitHub for task management and user authentication.</li><li>Uses Buy Me a Coffee for payment processling.</li><li>Uses Stripe for payment processing.</li><li>Web and Mobile <mxCell id="xD4pd0Jw3O8DJ77NfEvC-9" parent="xD4pd0Jw3O8DJ77NfEvC-8" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;rounded=1;fontFamily=Lucida Console;labelBackgroundColor=none;fontColor=#143642;" value="<div>Analytical approach to sports betting.</div><div><ul><li>Queries for odds data across bookies worldwide.</li><li>Scrapes historical sports data from various sources on the web (i.e., ESPN)</li><li>Various data pipelines perform data analysis.</li><li>Notifications / Signals are dynamically generated and sent directly to clients.</li><li>Web and Mobile applications.</li><li>Discord Bot Implementation.</li><li>Uses Stripe for payment processing.</li></ul></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="480" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xD4pd0Jw3O8DJ77NfEvC-11" parent="1" to create and manage Private Ledgers.</div><div><ul><li>Master Tracking Sheet view that tracks existing members and balances.</li><li>Performance Tracker view that tracks performance and share price by date.</li><li>Transactions view that tracks deposits and their source (i.e., Venmo, Cash App).</li><li>Various data pipelines perform data analysis.</li><li>Notifications / Signals are dynamically generated and sent directly to clietns.</li><li>Web and Mobile applications.</li><li>Discord Bot implementation.</li><li>Uses Stripe for payment processing.</li></ul></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="480" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xD4pd0Jw3O8DJ77NfEvC-13" parent="1" value="FitHealthU" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="520" x="490" y="740" as="geometry"> <mxRectangle height="30" width="140" x="490" y="740" as="alternateBounds" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xD4pd0Jw3O8DJ77NfEvC-14" parent="xD4pd0Jw3O8DJ77NfEvC-13" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;rounded=1;fontFamily=Lucida Console;labelBackgroundColor=none;fontColor=#143642;" value="<div>Fitness training and tracking application.</div><div><ul><li>Catalog / library of videos exhibiting each kind of exercise.</li><li>Excercise videos are then categorized into programs.</li><li>Programs are specific to each user's level of fitness.</li><li>Schedules and various goals can be assigned to schedules.</li><li>Various data pipelines perform data analysis.</li><li>Notifications / Signals are dynamically generated and sent directly to clients.</li><li>Web and Mobile applications.</li><li>Uses Stripe for payment processing.</li></ul></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="490" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xD4pd0Jw3O8DJ77NfEvC-15" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;sketch=1;hachureGap=4;jiggle=2;curveFitting=1;fontFamily=Verdana;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=#FAE5C7;strokeColor=#0F8B8D;fontColor=#143642;rounded=1;" value="NinjaTraderBot" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="310" width="520" x="490" y="1020" as="geometry"> <mxRectangle height="30" width="160" x="490" y="1020" as="alternateBounds" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xD4pd0Jw3O8DJ77NfEvC-16" parent="xD4pd0Jw3O8DJ77NfEvC-15" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;rounded=1;fontFamily=Lucida Console;labelBackgroundColor=none;fontColor=#143642;" value="<div>Bot that automatically trades.</div><div><ul><li>Written in NinjaScript (C#).</li><li>Automatically detects the following price action patterns:</li><ul><li>Continuation</li><li>Reversal</li><li>Head and Shoulders</li><li>Neck Retest</li><li>EMT</li><li>RE Entry</li><li>Trend Line</li></ul><li><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(20, 54, 66), rgb(173, 202, 213));">The chart is annotated with data that informs automated decisions.</span></li><li><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(20, 54, 66), rgb(173, 202, 213));">Entries and Exits are automated</span></li><li>Web and Mobile applications.</li><li>Uses Stripe for payment processing.</li></ul></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="480" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> ul.li: Queries for odds data across bookies worldwide.
Scrapes historical sports data from various sources on the web (i.e., ESPN)
Various data pipelines perform data analysis.
Notifications / Signals are dynamically generated and sent directly to clients.

div.div: Platform to create and manage Private Ledgers.

ul.li: Master Tracking Sheet view that tracks existing members and balances.
Performance Tracker view that tracks performance and share price by date.
Transactions view that tracks deposits and their source (i.e., Venmo, Cash App).
Various data pipelines perform data analysis.
Notifications / Signals are dynamically generated and sent directly to clietns.

ul.li: Catalog / library of videos exhibiting each kind of exercise.
Excercise videos are then categorized into programs.
Programs are specific to each user's level of fitness.
Schedules and various goals can be assigned to schedules.
Various data pipelines perform data analysis.
Notifications / Signals are dynamically generated and sent directly to clients.
